Tim and Krys, with the help of Tim's brother Ben, continue in their struggle to get the attic converted in time for the first guests of the season. Dick and his mother-in-law Jenny struggle with preparing and freezing 227kg of pork, before attempting to turn the final 2kg into salamis(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tim and Jules Anderson are first to host at the King's Head and Queen's Jules in Suffolk, where they provide their guests with a lesson in how to fillet fish, and an evening of karaoke. However, the owners find criticism hard to take the following morning(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gordon and Blossom welcome their rivals to the Hotel Continental in Harwich, Essex, where they are greeted by an erotic art display. The guests enjoy participating in a poetry reading during the afternoon, each writing their own piece, but the morning's breakfast goes awry after the hosts have a disagreement(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ryan Davies has to deal with a crisis when the contestants stay his five-star B&B Llanerch Vineyard in south Wales, but still manages to impress with his location and selection of wines. However, Gordon and Blossom go on a fault-finding mission and leave feedback the host is not happy with(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Neil and Tracy Bullows, owners of the Whitehall Hotel in Darwen, Lancashire, play host to the last night of the week's competition. Hoping to impress with a mix of professionalism and efficiency, they decide to take their guests on a tour of a local paint factory, but tempers fray and a stony silence follows at breakfast(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table(n)

programme.desc: Pregnant giraffe Orla goes into labour, but the keepers must watch from the sidelines due to the risks involved during the birth. Baby Bornean orang-utan Tombol tries his luck with the gibbons as he heads out and explores his new habitat. Elsewhere, northern bald ibis chick Professor X is proving too confident for his own good, and when it is time to release him into the adult habitat he gets into troubled waters and suffers a nasty head injury, so the vets have to work hard to help him pull through(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A dachshund is brought in by owners Kelly and Daniel to see if anything can be done to repair a deformity in its foot, and Noel Fitzpatrick gives the one-year-old a lesson in doggy discipline along the way. A 10-month-old labrador needs a hip replacement before it can begin training as a medical-alert dog to help its owner with her rare health condition. An eight-year-old shih-tzu has the most extraordinary walk the vet has ever seen, but the operation to fix the dog's spine will be extremely risky, presenting the owners with an agonising decision(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim, Fuzz and the team work on a 1963 Alfa Romeo Giulia Spider that has been kept in a dusty barn in Essex after its owner's plans to restore it were interrupted by the onset of a serious medical condition(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw plan a surprise restoration of a 1972 Peugeot 504 cabriolet in need of a major overhaul - but nearly get caught smuggling it back to their workshop(n)

programme.desc: Mark Evans witnesses the reconstruction from scratch of a Jaguar XKSS, the first time this historic road-going conversion of a race car has been built since its original creation in the 1950s. Only 16 of the cars were ever made, but they dominated the Le Mans circuit and are now among the most sought-after cars in the world(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Joan and Barry Manville are downsizing from their family home in Bolton. But they are completely torn on where to buy their new home. Joan wants to remain in the UK and move to the seaside resort of Lytham St Annes, but Barry is looking for a new adventure in the beautiful countryside of southern Brittany. Laura Hamilton pulls out all the stops to keep them in the UK with a budget of £125,000, while Jonnie Irwin does everything he can to impress Joan to buy in France with three charming properties for up to £65,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Nick Lawler seems to be warming to the owners, but one of them suspects his change of heart is all part of a cunning plan(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick Lawler and business partner Kate Wilson host the competition at the Winder Hall Country House B&B in the Lake District, but a clash of egos ensues when they try to lecture the other participants about how to manage their hospitality establishments, and a disastrous breakfast service leaves contestants unimpressed(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's penguins move into a temporary home while a new luxury home is built for them, but the move becomes upsetting when malaria sweeps the colony, with elder Rudd battling to survive against the odds. Meanwhile, the African painted dog pups venture out of their den for the first time, but the runt of the litter Mosi refuses to go out into the cold, and keepers worry she may have issues with her eyesight. Elsewhere, Sumatran orangutan Emma gives birth, and a beetle with a wonky horn has to fight other bachelors in the group to win the attention of a female.(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Two-year-old Labrador Ira is fitted with a bionic spine, while anxious owner Rob brings in eight-year-old French bulldog Tom, who has a long list of chronic ailments. Matt and Rebecca arrive at the clinic with their three-year-old cat Marley, who may need to have a leg amputated(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to Hampshire to repair a 1982 VW Golf GTi Mk1 that has been kept in a garage since a road accident in 2001. However, they both have different ideas about how the finished car should look when it is returned to its owner(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Billy, Gwendoline and Michael locate their heating problem, but it means Billy faces the tricky task of repointing the chimney 20 metres up - despite being scared of heights(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Colin Mackinnon and his partner Marta Briongos take on an ambitious project to build a bespoke metal home next to an airfield runway, designed by one of Scotland's most eminent architects and inspired by aircraft hangars. They have to contend with violent rain, snow, 100mph winds and the worst storms for a century, and the couple have to draw on their reserves of mental energy, as what was supposed to be a 12-month build heads into a third year(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On a Bank Holiday shift in Bromsgrove, a man is treated for sudden, severe headaches, while paramedics in Worcester climb over a garden fence to reach a biker with a shattered leg(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman with a weak immune system owing to the radiotherapy she underwent for breast cancer is bitten by her cat, a minor injury that could cause her serious problems. A 71-year-old with terminal cancer is brought in with breathing difficulties and a decision must be made about whether to resuscitate her if her condition worsens. Meanwhile, a 12-year-old translates for his Brazilian grandmother and a five-year-old has her head wound stitched(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts, with Sean Lock and Stephen Mangan taking on guest captain Richard Ayoade and Katherine Ryan. Bill Bailey is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley is in charge of the letters and numbers(n)

programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman with a weak immune system owing to the radiotherapy she underwent for breast cancer is bitten by her cat, a minor injury that could cause her serious problems. programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton is in Darwin in Australia's Northern Territory to find out how crocodiles are farmed for their meat, while Jimmy Doherty travels to Grimsby and Iceland as he investigates whether It's possible to make oil from salmon or haddock livers instead of the more traditional cod. Plus, Matt Tebbutt examines why bagels taste so different to bread despite the ingredients being virtually the same(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp joins members of a Women's Institute group and together they learn needle felting and how to make a mosaic. However, teaming up is a first for the presenter and they all try to agree on their final entry for the New Forest and Hampshire County Show(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harmin and Laura Hamilton go head to head to help Sue and David Sherlock from Stockport. The couple want a fresh start with their daughter, but cannot decide where to start their new adventure. David is championing the Lake District, close to his three grown-up daughters, but Sue wants a complete change and thinks their future lies in the Dordogne region of France. Jasmine is given a UK budget of £730,000, but it's going to be close as Laura tries to entice them across the Channel with three attractive properties in France worth up to £500,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their children having left home, Maureen and Brian Kellengher want to downsize and enjoy their retirement. However, while they love the idea of staying close to family and friends along the Suffolk-Essex border, they're excited about starting a whole new life in Lanzarote. Jonnie Irwin shows them three beautiful properties for their budget of £320,000 to tempt them to stay in the UK and Jasmine Harman goes all out with three properties for £225,000 in Lanzarote(n)

programme.title: Slow Train Through Africa with Griff Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The comedian makes five train journeys taking in the spectacular sights of Africa, travelling to unexpected places in deserts and forests, villages and cities, and finding out how the railways are used today. He begins in the north, on a line that links the trading cities of Morocco, Algeria and Tunisia. Stocking up for his trip at a souk in Marrakesh, he boards the train for a seven-hour ride to the ancient city of Fes, and eventually reaches the Sahara - and his final destination of Tozeur(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: A man is temporarily woken from a coma to help piece together the family history of his dying son. programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will takes Karen to see one of the best doctors in the city after she misses her check-up, while Jack flirts with a male nurse - and the idea of becoming one himself. Guest starring Jack Black(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A teenager is brought in after a heart attack, and the doctor challenges his team to solve the case by lunchtime. As Cameron, Chase and Foreman run tests, House suggests the patient may be suffering from a condition brought on by the death of his parents - and takes unusual steps to identify it. Meanwhile, Tritter suspends Wilson's licence to gain his co-operation. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl's divorced parents fail to agree on whether she should have surgery and the case is taken to court, where Cuddy is awarded the power to make decisions about the child's care. Meanwhile, a low supply of Vicodin takes its toll on House, and Cameron and Foreman's bank accounts are frozen as Tritter continues to press them for information about their boss. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The buy-to-let documentary series revisits some of the cases featured in the show's first run, including Demetrios and Miriam, who sought help from Lewisham Council after chilly conditions and unusual bathroom and kitchen arrangements in their south London flat became intolerable. Gareth and Joanna of Phoenix Community Care detail their ongoing battle against squatters who took up residence in the building they intended to turn into a community centre for vulnerable children, and Peterborough City Council's Housing officer Peter returns to a property deemed a category one fire hazard by the fire service - and therefore unfit for human habitation(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord's tenants refuse to move out, so he starts extensive building work around them, while another landlord tries to recover £30,000 in unpaid rent through the courts(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Sheriffs Stewart and Elmor try to recover almost £2,400 from a company director for unpaid invoices in Manchester, but face a fierce reception from a family who deny the debtor lives or trades from the address. Meanwhile, agents Gary and Cona in Kent chase nearly £4,000 owed by a couple for unpaid rent on a previous tenancy(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor set out to evict a tenant from a property in Manchester but when the man claims he knew nothing about the court order tempers begin to fray. A car salesman in Cumbria is not happy about paying £4,500 to a dissatisfied customer, and in Shropshire a pub licensee claims she is unable to pay the rent she owes to her ex-landlord. With emotions running high, can she cut a new deal?(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned and Yashvi's relationship is put to the test. Chloe comes under more pressure at work when Lucy unexpectedly arrives. Tensions between Harlow and Hendrix intensify(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Willow tackles Dean about his reaction to her news, but Ziggy puts off telling him of her job offer. Maggie and Roo make a start with Bella's home-schooling programme(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A man on board a flight becomes violently ill, and fellow passengers House and Cuddy suspect they are dealing with a meningitis outbreak when a woman develops the same symptoms. The doctor hastily puts together a team to help solve the mystery and performs a spinal tap using makeshift tools. Meanwhile, Cameron and Chase's relationship begins to affect their work(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl suffers a stroke, and it later emerges she has a heart condition normally only found in older people. Cameron and Chase visit the youngster's home in search of a cause and find evidence of possible abuse. Meanwhile, Wilson takes Cuddy to see a play(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned and Yashvi's relationship is put to the test. Chloe comes under more pressure at work when Lucy unexpectedly arrives. Tensions between Harlow and Hendrix intensify(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ryder sees Jade taking money from the till. Reaching for the bottle after Ziggy's departure, Dean cancels his surfing lessons and quits the board shop(n)

programme.title: Aldi vs Lidl: Supermarket Wars
programme.desc: The success of the two German-owned supermarket chains, investigating their canny marketing ploys and aggressive sales techniques in their battle for domination. Insiders reveal the secrets behind both supermarkets' success and how they compete with their rivals, while the programme highlights the most tempting cut-price products that are the key to their success(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Officers in Huntingdon explain that they had a problem with regular drunken violence at weekends, but that CCTV is at the forefront of their initiative to turn things around. Nick Wallis also discovers how CCTV is helping Chester's local council and the police manage problems on Race Day(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis examines how CCTV and helicopter cameras mean wrongdoers can no longer hide in a crowd. He highlights the use of such footage to help seal the conviction of a man involved in the August 2011 riots across England, and reports on a state-of-the-art network monitoring a football crowd of 21,000 as Leicester City take on Barnsley(n)

programme.title: Final Destination 2 (2003)
programme.desc: During a traffic jam, a teenage girl has a vision of a devastating motorway pile-up, which later occurs, convincing her she has cheated death. As time passes, her fellow road-users suffer unfortunate accidents, leaving her with the growing suspicion that fate is redressing matters. Horror sequel, starring AJ Cook, Michael Landes and Tony Todd(n)

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: Tortured By Mum and Dad? The Turpin 13
programme.desc: This documentary investigates the shocking story of David and Louise Turpin, who kept their 13 children imprisoned in their own home until they were found in January 2018 when one of the siblings escaped and called the police. This programme shines a light on the mystery of how an unassuming suburban family in California managed to hide their dark and sinister secret for so long(n)

programme.title: Missing or Murdered?
programme.desc: A look at the case of 35-year-old chef Claudia Lawrence, who disappeared in 2009 sparking one of the most high profile missing persons cases of recent years. The programme examines how media coverage of Claudia's private life impacted on the police investigation, and analyses theories of what really happened, including a recent possible sighting of her in Amsterdam and her mother's fears of sex trafficking(n)

programme.title: Riverdale
programme.desc: Archie learns that one of his old teachers has been murdered. Convinced the attacks are linked, he takes steps to defend himself. Cheryl interferes in FP's gangland trial(n)

programme.title: Riverdale
programme.desc: Archie sets up a group to protect his fellow students after Kevin makes a grisly discovery in the woods and a mysterious figure claims responsibility for the string of attacks(n)

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen takes Jack out to celebrate his success at nursing school, only to bump into her arch-enemy. Grace is reunited with an old flame, and Will is stood up on a dinner date. Candice Bergen (Murphy Brown) guest stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Wilson strikes a deal with Tritter that will send House to rehab for two months if he pleads guilty to illegally obtaining drugs, but he refuses to accept it. As the team starts treating a 15-year-old girl with a collapsed lung, Cuddy takes him off the case and cuts off the medic's supply of painkillers until he accepts the offer(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: As a judge sets the date for House's hearing, Cuddy urges the stubborn doctor to apologise to Tritter. Meanwhile, a firefighter reacts violently during treatment for his fluctuating body temperature. The team learns the patient is having heart attacks triggered by romantic feelings for a colleague - prompting a course of electroshock therapy to erase her from his memory. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A Yorkshire landlord has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired secretary has to visit her tenant in prison to retake possession of her buy-to-let flat. A Manchester mother applies to the housing charity Shelter for help because she is convinced the property she is renting is making her children ill(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmor chase over £1,500 of unpaid parking fines in Manchester, while Matt and Garry have a job to reclaim £1,600 for a car hire company in the West Midlands. Finally, Stewart and Vic head to Lancashire to recover over £3,000 owed by a garage to a dissatisfied customer(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor are in Manchester to recover £4,000 owed to a firm of architects, only for the debtor to attempt to throw them off the scent. Stewart is joined by Vic in Liverpool to track down a landlord who owes his former tenants deposits totalling £5,000, while Gareth and Mitch are in for a surprise when they chase a builder in Wiltshire(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Chloe's slamdunk is a success, but the hotel is falling short of Lucy's targets and an e-mail brings bad news. Hendrix is devastated by the death of his cat(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ryder sees Jade taking money from the till. Reaching for the bottle after Ziggy's departure, Dean cancels his surfing lessons and quits the board shop(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Foreman treats a con artist suffering from paralysis, convinced her condition stems from drug abuse - and finds that the case forces him to confront his prejudices. Meanwhile, House quizzes Wilson's ex-wife about his romantic habits. Medical mystery drama, starring Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The brother of a young leukaemia patient is found to be a matching bone marrow donor. However, when he becomes sick before the transplant, the team races to cure him so the procedure can go ahead. House deliberately aggravates the patient's infection to help reach a diagnosis, but both boys continue to deteriorate as time runs out. Meanwhile, Foreman makes a radical decision about his future(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Chloe's slamdunk is a success, but the hotel is falling short of Lucy's targets and an e-mail brings bad news. Hendrix is devastated by the death of his cat(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Jasmine hears about Tori's transfer to Northern Districts and warns that the move is extremely risky. Ryder sees a different side of Jade when he tackles her about the theft(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: This edition focuses on young people living on state welfare, including 18-year-old Dean from Harlow in Essex, who has no intention of getting a job unless forced. Twentysomethings Danielle and her boyfriend Josh are unable to work due to anxiety and depression and have moved to Blackpool to make a new start. However, with four children between them from previous relationships and another on the way they are struggling to make ends meet on a joint benefits income of around £100 a week(n)

programme.title: Benefits
programme.desc: Three generations of the Kerrigan family live in one of the most deprived parts of Sheffield and claim tens of thousands of pounds in benefits each year. Mum-of-five Rose volunteers with sister Annette at the local food bank, but neither has ever had a full-time job, while her nephew Adam is a father of four and has been on the dole for three years. Another nephew Robert is also on benefits, but insists his children won't be dressed in 'cheap tacky clothes' and buys himself at least one pair of designer trainers every few weeks(n)

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life(n)

programme.title: Squatters Next Door
programme.desc: Storm Huntley investigates squatting, with interviewees including a landlord who recently had his empty property occupied by 20 unwanted illegal residents. She also meets Luke, who says squatting saved his life, and Julian, who is claiming squatters' rights(n)

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek (2010)
programme.desc: A record company employee is given the dubious task of making sure a manic, sex-crazed British rock star gets from London to his comeback concert in Los Angeles without causing too much mayhem along the way. His task is made all the more difficult by his charge's infatuation with a model. Comedy, with Russell Brand reprising his role from Forgetting Sarah Marshall alongside Jonah Hill and Rose Byrne(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Fontana call on the Special Victims Unit to help them uncover the truth about the death of a man found with one of Olivia Benson's business cards in his pocket. programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A discrepancy at the murder scene of an 18-year-old woman implicates assistant district attorney Craig Hansen in a different crime. Stella interrupts a bail hearing to arrest him, but her intervention results in a suspected killer being released back onto the streets. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A quarterback is found dead with traces of anaesthetic in her blood, prompting the detectives to set about discovering who could have wanted to kill her. A team-mate becomes the prime suspect, but further digging focuses attention on her problematic relationship with an ex-fiance, who reveals she had become obsessed with cosmetic procedures. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Fontana call on the Special Victims Unit to help them uncover the truth about the death of a man found with one of Olivia Benson's business cards in his pocket. The team soon realises that two career criminals are involved - but faced with conflicting stories, Benson and McCoy struggle to agree on who is telling the truth. Lynda Carter guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A deathbed confession leads to a 10-year-old murder investigation being reopened, but Fontana's methods bring him into conflict with McCoy, who is being pressured by Branch to win the case. To complicate matters, vital information is ruled inadmissible because it was given in confidence to a Church minister. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in the East River leads Briscoe and Green to investigate the drug-addicted brother of a famous footballer - and as the case unfolds, it becomes clear she may not have been the killer's only victim. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Seth lies critically ill in hospital, the doctor reveals he was poisoned, but Jessica suspects someone else was the intended victim and decides to confront Eudora. Jean Simmons guest stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A trip to Paris - and a chance encounter with a British agent friend - sees Jessica re-routed to Athens, where she gets embroiled in an intriguing mix of murder and espionage. Richard Todd and Ian Ogilvy guest star, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An actress is found stabbed to death in an award-winning songwriter's apartment, and police believe the musician knows more than he is letting on. Clues lead them to the victim's therapy group as they try to discover who would profit from her death. Starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a fire at a rock concert that left 23 people dead, and discover that the band's pyrotechnics may have caused the blaze. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A candidate for the next New York mayoral elections finds her campaign in jeopardy when Goren and Eames investigate her husband on suspicion of hiring a hitman to kill a judge. However, evidence resulting from a tip-off and the discovery of a second body may be a little too neat - and instead indicate a conspiracy. Xander Berkeley guest stars, with Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives Benson and Stabler check the handbag of a suspected rape victim for identification and discover the severed finger of a small child in a plastic bag. A murder investigation is launched and Tutuola uncovers a series of traumatic events experienced by the woman in question during childhood(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman asks Benson and Stabler to help her find out who made her daughter pregnant. The girl, who has Down's syndrome, is unable to give much information, especially while being pressured by her distraught mother to abort the baby(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A missing teenager leads the team to a man preying on the daughters he fathered through a sperm bank. Starring BD Wong, James Van Der Beek and Eric Close(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After witnessing a kidnapping, Rollins discovers the abductee was a 19-year-old woman involved in the world of body modification. When her leg is found in a canal, the detectives learn another limb was also discovered in the same area 11 years previously, and the same technique was used to sever it. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Crossover episode with Chicago Fire, Chicago Justice and Chicago Med. Olinsky's daughter is in a critical condition following a fire at an old warehouse where teenagers were partying. There are strong suspicions that the cause was arson, leaving Voight determined to track down the culprit - with the full support of Peter Stone and Firehouse 51(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: The search for a lost girl ends when she is found chained up in a shipping container. But that is just the start of the mystery when investigations lead to a pair of bodies(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac's motor racing hero dies in an explosion during an exhibition event and investigations reveal someone had tampered with his car. Unfortunately, the detectives face an ever-increasing list of suspects as they discover conflicting evidence about who could have sabotaged it. Crime drama, guest starring Antonio Sabato Jr, with Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A car bomb kills the husband of an incapacitated woman shortly before he planned to switch off her life support. Fontana and Green are drawn into a heated debate about the right to die, and find themselves faced with two suspects who both have iron-clad alibis(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green investigate the murder of an undercover reporter who was working on a story about a violent street gang known as L-12, following a trail of clues that leads them to a frightened businessman. Realising that his evidence could be vital to cracking the case, McCoy and Borgia urge him to testify - but he refuses to co-operate for fear of reprisals against his imprisoned son(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The admissions director of an exclusive Manhattan elementary school is bludgeoned to death and Briscoe and Green initially believe she was murdered by a parent determined to have their child enrolled. However, as their investigation continues, a member of the school's staff comes under suspicion. Guest starring Roger Rees, with Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a Russian model, and when the autopsy reveals a host of old injuries they suspect long-term abuse. Further tests are made on the body, and the findings suggest medical malpractice may have been the cause, leading the detectives to track down the person responsible for her death. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Cabot Cove's new priest takes a murderer's confession, and asks Jessica to help him uncover the truth without breaking his sacred oath of absolute confidentiality. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The death of an elderly writer prompts Jessica to recall an intriguing mystery that happened aboard the Queen Mary some 50 years previously. Guest starring Robert Vaughn, with Angela Lansbury and June Havoc(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called to investigate the death of an executive shot in his apartment, and discover the victim had lost his job nine months previously - leaving them mystified as to where a sizeable bank deposit he had been living off could have come from. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's partially decomposed body is found in the Hudson River, and her husband initially becomes the prime suspect for her murder. However, as the investigation proceeds, Briscoe and Green uncover a related corruption scandal involving several lawyers and a judge. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: When an NSA analyst is killed in a car crash, Keaton and his team realise that she has stolen a piece of cloaking software that she intends to pass on to Tal. Shepherd decodes the encrypted message that Tal had left for the analyst, which reveals exactly where it was supposed to be delivered. Seizing their opportunity, Keaton asks Shepherd to go undercover, posing as the now dead analyst. Shepherd meets with Tal's contact, a young man called Braden. After a successful handover, the team learn that Tal is definitely in the US. In Washington DC, Tal meets with a mystery man who assures him that he can help with his FBI problem(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The murder of a transvestite in a church throws suspicion on its resident priest, who Benson and Stabler discover has a history of sexual abuse charges. They try to talk to the cleric's previous victims, who are reluctant to get involved because of a confidentiality agreement they signed - but when one of them finally opens up, new light is thrown on the culprit's identity(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A couple confront a businessman who is trying to break into their car, only to discover he has been stabbed. Benson and Stabler are forced to go undercover in a modern-day swingers club, posing as a married couple but in reality seeking information about possible suspects. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part one of three. A woman is found murdered at a bachelor party in a penthouse apartment, and the detectives discover prominent figures were in attendance, including athletes, hedge-fund managers and the groom-to-be, who is the police commissioner's son. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A baby goes missing, allegedly taken unwittingly by thieves who were unaware it was strapped into the back seat of a car they stole. Benson and Amaro gather statements from the anxious mother and her boyfriend - but discrepancies in their accounts raise suspicions. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: A cameraman who films crime scenes is found murdered in his car, and hidden video footage soon leads the team to realise he was blackmailing one of the city's wealthiest families(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Burgess encourages her sister to spend a night out with friends, but when it turns out Nicole never made it home, she is found in a railway station - a victim of sexual assault(n)

programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. Guest starring Harold Perrineau (Lost, Oz) and Edward Furlong (Terminator 2, American History X)(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac witnesses a suspicious exchange of briefcases from his window while recuperating from an injury at home, and the strange goings-on lead to murder. The investigation unexpectedly puts him back in touch with ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll. An episode paying homage to Alfred Hitchcock's film Rear Window, starring Gary Sinise, with Claire Forlani(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A nurse with a social agenda is arrested on suspicion of performing illegal sterilisations on troubled teenagers without their knowledge - a policy that has resulted in the death of one patient. As McCoy and Borgia prepare their case against her, they discover former ADA Paul Robinette is planning to act for the defence(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green track down a disturbed woman who has not only murdered a young mother and stolen her five-day-old son, but also managed to convince her own husband that the baby is really theirs. As the case goes to trial, another man comes forward claiming to be the child's real father, leaving McCoy and Borgia facing a dilemma(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Four murders occur in Manhattan, all of which seem to have been committed by the same sniper. Although the shootings appear random, Briscoe and Green suspect the deaths are linked and discover a connection between one of the victims and a former marine who is an expert shot with the rifle used in the crimes. Ty Burrell (Modern Family) guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have their hands full investigating four homicides, including the killing of a husband by his distraught wife and the murder of a woman who had a complex relationship with two brothers. They then have to look into the abduction of an expectant mother. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits Palm Springs to check on an investment and finds herself drawn into solving the murder of a property developer. She initially believes the dead man's wife is guilty of the crime, but the suspect's subsequent suicide complicates matters further. Elliott Gould guest stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher recounts the unusual tale of a private eye who reluctantly recruited a new partner in the form of a French poodle, which once belonged to a murder victim. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A reporter accused of causing the deaths of US soldiers in Iraq by revealing confidential information is shot and wounded in New York. The team discovers the gun belonged to one of the dead servicemen, and suspicion soon falls on a disgruntled colleague of the deceased(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called to investigate the murder of a grief counsellor who claimed he could communicate with the dead, and discover he was a conman with a host of disgruntled clients, any one of whom might have had a motive for killing him. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A day spent working on a cut-and-dried case leaves the team free to spend some time away from work, and while McGee and Delilah argue over the importance of keeping shop-talk to a minimum, DiNozzo ends up boring his dinner date with crime-solving tales. However, the agents' personal plans are all interrupted as, one-by-one, they realise errors have been made in closing their latest investigation. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers find a thumb in some rubbish while investigating a fire bombing in Little Italy. Unable to convince a witness to testify against their main suspect, they hope that identifying the thumb will provide them with some evidence. Meanwhile, Oliver helps Andy prepare her defence at Duncan's dismissal hearing. However, when Duncan produces new evidence that shifts all the blame on to Andy, Oliver must decide if he is willing to compromise his professional integrity - and his friendship with Andy - to save her career. Missy Peregrym and Gregory Smith star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a girl is discovered outside a church by two children, and investigations lead the team members to believe she was killed by someone known to her. Benson and Stabler soon realise that to find the person responsible they will require the help of psychiatrist Captain Jackson (guest star Jeremy Irons). Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A music student is raped at gunpoint in her apartment - but although the SVU squad is quick to make an arrest, high-profile defence attorney Bayard Ellis tries to undermine prosecution evidence and damage the victim's credibility. Drama, guest starring Sofia Vassilieva(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cragen goes undercover when a murder in Brighton Beach leads the team to a thriving mail-order bride business, and hopes to hunt down the killer. programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A retired policeman is killed in a diamond robbery, and the vengeful team soon picks up a clue as one of the culprits has left behind a trail of blood. However, rather than make an immediate arrest, McGarrett and Danno stake out the robber's girlfriend, who was also involved in the crime, hoping to pick up both of them at the same time - and as the hours pass, it becomes clear the colleagues have a few issues to resolve. US crime drama, starring Alex O'Loughlin and Scott Caan. Directed by series star Daniel Dae Kim, who plays Chin Ho(n)

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Watson is certain that Elana March, a vengeful crime boss, set up the attempt on her life, and despite fearing for her own safety, heads into prison to confront the woman she put behind bars. Meanwhile, Holmes drags a reluctant Detective Bell into a case involving two missing zebras, and there's a further shock in store for Watson when an old enemy gets in touch(n)

programme.title: Brits Behind Bars
programme.desc: With thousands of UK citizens currently held in jails around the world, this documentary focuses on the moving cases of British prisoners. Those who break the law overseas face potentially lethal consequences - nightmare 'living hell' conditions, disease, abuse, terror, and sometimes even death. Meeting families and lawyers forging major battles to get fair treatment for their loved ones, the programme reveals trials that have gone catastrophically wrong, dubious evidence, and one man who has been struggling to prove his innocence for almost three decades(n)

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: Fred Dinenage explores the continuing fascination with Jack the Ripper, who murdered five women in Whitechapel, London, in 1888 but was never caught(n)

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Extreme World
programme.desc: The actor and his documentary team expose stories of crime and hardship around the world, beginning with sex trafficking in India. Ross visits the notorious red-light district of Mumbai, where secretly filmed footage reveals not only the scale of the industry but how young some of the girls trapped in it are. He also travels across country to West Bengal, meeting families whose daughters have been taken from them, and comes face to face with a sex trafficker who confesses to many shocking acts that leave the presenter and his team stunned(n)

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: The heat is on during the warmest day of the year as the team helps a motorcyclist who finds himself underneath a minibus filled with partygoers in fancy dress. Attention then turns to a 16-year-old youth who has suffered a major head injury after falling from his bike, and in Darlington, Co Durham, a man needs to be extracted from his car following a collision. There is also some confusion over an accident said to have involved a wooden post(n)

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Extreme World
programme.desc: Ross Kemp and his team visit Papua New Guinea, one of the most diverse yet chaotic nations on Earth. Beginning his journey in the capital, Port Moresby, where gangs control the streets and armed robberies, car-jackings and rape are commonplace, the actor soon realises that life is dictated by tribal custom. But when he travels into the highlands along one of the world's most dangerous roads, where an estimated 400 people are murdered every year, Ross finds himself held at gunpoint by hijackers(n)

programme.title: How to Stay Young
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary in which Angela Rippon and Dr Chris van Tulleken investigate the latest experiments and research that could help put the brakes on the ageing process. The first programme focuses on the physical aspects, revealing how much is down to how people live their lives and how people's lifestyle choices can help combat the effects of ageing. Chris finds out how public attitudes to the elderly can have a negative impact, spending a day as an 80-year-old with the help of Hollywood-style prosthetics, and Angela visits a study in Germany comparing the benefits of dancing with conventional gym exercises(n)
